text:
Created attachment 163058
shar-v1

AnyDesk is a remote desktop client. At its core is DeskRT, a video
codec that is specifically designed for graphical user interfaces.

AnyDesk is the fastest remote desktop software on the market.
It allows for new usage scenarios and applications that have not
been possible with current remote desktop software.

WWW: http://anydesk.com/remote-desktop
